articles.title: Key moments of police bodycam footage
articles.description: BBC Verify has analysed bodycam footage that was released by the police of Henry Nowak after being stabbed by Vickrum Digwa.

articles.title: Three quarters of workers not on track for 'moderate' pension income, report suggests
articles.description: A newly-published report suggests a moderate lifestyle in retirement costs £32,700 for one person and £45,400 for two.

articles.title: US and Iran launch new strikes, as Kuwait says airport hit by Iranian drones
articles.description: Kuwait says its international airport has been badly damaged by Iranian drones, and traffic is suspended.

articles.title: Police sent personal details to the wrong person, says alleged Al Fayed victim
articles.description: Joanna Brittan says notes about her alleged abuse were sent by the Met to another alleged victim in error.
